Local-only egress model.question: Default network behavior in local-only mode?
options_presented: Deny external egress but allow localhost/system

Local-only egress model.question: How should allowlist exceptions be handled?
Local-only egress model.answer: Explicit per-run allowlist flags plus policy entries
options_presented: Explicit per-run allowlist flags + policy entries

Local-only egress model.question: What should happen when a blocked egress attempt occurs?
Local-only egress model.answer: Hard fail with actionable error and blocked target details

Local-only egress model.question: Should LLM/rubric network usage have a deliberate escape hatch in Phase 1?
Local-only egress model.answer: Off by default, explicit opt-in mode required
options_presented: Off by default, explicit opt-in mode required
Disallow all LLM calls when local-only is enabled

Initial enforcement scope.question: Which entrypoints must be policy-gated in Phase 1?
Initial enforcement scope.answer: evals/run.sh, evals/graders/llm-rubric.mjs, evals/graders/deterministic.mjs, evals/report.mjs, and .github/workflows/static.yml checks

Initial enforcement scope.question: How strict should enforcement be for non-gated entrypoints in Phase 1?
Initial enforcement scope.answer: Block execution if entrypoint is not policy-gated
options_presented: Block execution if entrypoint is not policy-gated

Initial enforcement scope.question: How should docs/skill instructions be tied to policy scope?
Initial enforcement scope.answer: Required references to policy contract in skill/docs

Initial enforcement scope.question: How should publish-related policy checks behave in this phase?
Initial enforcement scope.answer: Pre-publish hard gate on approved paths plus policy check
options_presented: Pre-publish hard gate on approved paths + policy check
Keep publish checks out of this phase

Local verification flow.question: What should be the primary local verification command surface in Phase 1?
options_presented: Direct script checks in each tool

Local verification flow.question: When should policy verification run in developer workflow?
Local verification flow.answer: Before eval runs and in CI
options_presented: Before eval runs and in CI

Local verification flow.question: How should verification results be represented?
If verification fails, what behavior do you want in Phase 1?
Local verification flow.answer: Hard stop; require explicit fix before proceeding
